nasb.text: When considerable time had passed and the voyage was now dangerous, since even the fast was already over, Paul began to admonish them,

esv.text: Since much time had passed, and the voyage was now dangerous because even the Fast was already over, Paul advised them,

cnv.text: 過了相當的時候，連禁食節也過去了，所以航行很危險，保羅就勸告他們，

ccb.text: 我们耽误了不少日子，禁食的节期已过，航行很危险，保罗劝告众人说：

csbs.text: 又过了很久，这次航程已经很危险，又因为已经过了禁食日，保罗就劝大家，
